items.name: ARES GEN-3 Exoskeleton [Torso] [Grey]
items.description:
The third-generation Augmented Reflex Enhancement System (ARES) is a state-of-the-art exoskeleton frame developed by the BLKT Corporation, widely regarded as one of their flagship military assets. Standard-issue across BLKT's military forces, the exoskeleton has also surfaced repeatedly beyond official channels, rumored to have been funneled into black markets amid the ongoing corporate war.

Complete the set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=ARES&Category=1&CreatorName=Darkzone+Armory&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&IncludeNotForSale

Check out our other UGC items: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Darkzone%20Armory&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

items.name: Mask
items.description:
👑 SCARY SKELETON MASK 🎭


Join group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/34766380/2312#!/about

Step into the spotlight and transform your avatar with the Royal Jester Mask – a perfect blend of mystery, fun, and style!

 Featuring a vibrant design with bold red, green, and blue accents, this mask combines the playful spirit of a jester with the elegance of a royal crown. The tall pointed crown and golden tips add a 

Whether you’re roleplaying in a medieval kingdom, attending a masquerade ball, or just looking to bring some festive vibes to your Roblox adventures, this mask is the ultimate accessory. It fits perfectly with fantasy outfits, carnival costumes, and even modern streetwear for those who like mixing styles
